corrections.text: The article states the Data and AI Trust Maturity Model was 'developed in partnership with McKinsey and based on research with 300 senior business and technology leaders, according to StorageReview and Compare the Cloud.' Neither StorageReview nor Compare the Cloud names McKinsey as a development partner. The McKinsey partnership is documented in SiliconANGLE (already cited elsewhere in the article). The McKinsey attribution should cite SiliconANGLE rather than StorageReview and Compare the Cloud.
